name: Java CI com Maven

# O que dispara a automação: qualquer push na branch main ou master
on:
  push:
    branches: [ "main", "master" ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ "main", "master" ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Baixar o código do repositório
      uses: actions/checkout@v3
    
    - name: Configurar o Java 21
      uses: actions/setup-java@v3
      with:
        java-version: '21'
        distribution: 'temurin'
        cache: maven

    - name: Rodar Testes e Compilar (Maven)
      run: mvn -B package
